title: 2 Pack Thick Stainless Steel Dog Bowls Food Grade Safe Pet Cat & Dogs Feeder Bowls and Water Bowls Easy to Clean (17.5cm)
features: 【Quality and Safe Material】The pet bowl is made of high quality stainless steel with high end polished finish to make it stronger, more durable and with better stain and rust resistance without any odour. Compared with plastic or ceramic dog bowls, this is definitely a better choice.

【Effortless Cleaning】Seamless, one-piece construction ensures no crevices for grime to hide. A quick rinse with water effortlessly removes sticky wet food or crunchy kibble residue, saving busy pet owners time for more cuddles and playtime.

【Durable & Scratch-Resistant】This pet bowl undergoes rigorous quality checks and is coated with anti-rust and anti-scratch technology to withstand pet claws and drops. Its sturdy construction extends its life
【Multifunctional Bowl 】 The perfect feeding bowl can hold dry coarse ground food or wet food, snacks and water, very suitable for pets dog & cat.
【Pet Bowl Size】Bowl diameter: 17.5 cm (6.9 inches). Bowl height: 4.7cm (1.85 inches), Suitable for small medium dog and cat
